title: Gigantis, the Fire Monster
director: Hugo Grimaldi, Motoyoshi Oda, Jack Bernhard
writer: Hugo Grimaldi, Shigeaki Hidaka, Shigeru Kayama
actors: Minoru Chiaki, Shôichi Hirose, Miyoko Hoshino
plot: The heavily re-edited American version of Godzilla Raids Again. A prehistoric monster called Gigantis emerges alongside another creature named Angurus.
